title: Carpet ROF Addition
description: An optimized Carpet mod that slightly disrupts vanilla features.
body:
**ROF Carpet Addition** is an extension for Carpet that focuses on reducing lag in technical Minecraft servers without breaking normal gameplay, while adding some quality-of-life features.

This mod follows the Carpet style: features are implemented as gamerules that can be enabled, disabled, or tuned individually. Under the default configuration, vanilla behavior is not changed.

### Main features include:

- **Ender pearl cannon optimizations**: aggressive TNT merging, more stable pearl chunk loading, and optimized raycast (Assuming naturally generated blocks’ height stays under a threshold). With all optimizations enabled, average MSPT from pearl launch to landing is reduced by 80%–95%; for very large cannons (>5000 TNT), lag can drop by two orders of magnitude.

-  **Intelligent packet limiting**: restricts packet sending from specific entities in certain areas without affecting normal survival, reducing network and client lag. Used for large-scale sand duplicators and mob farms.

-  **More detailed permission control**: By directly modifying the vanilla command tree, achieve finer-grained permission control, for example, being able to control permissions for subcommands of a command.


- Other small utilities are also included.

**Documentation**: [Rules](https://github.com/Melationin/ROF-Carpet-Addition/blob/master/docs/en_us/rules.md)，[Commands](https://github.com/Melationin/ROF-Carpet-Addition/blob/master/docs/en_us/command.md)

**Development and snapshot builds** are available through GitHub Actions in the repository.

Note: English translation uses LLM translation.
